nasb.text: But the one who was injuring his neighbor pushed him away, saying, ‘Who made you a ruler and judge over us?

esv.text: But the man who was wronging his neighbor thrust him aside, saying, ‘Who made you a ruler and a judge over us?

cnv.text: 那欺負鄰舍的把他推開，說：‘誰立了你作我們的領袖和審判官呢？

ccb.text: 不料那个欺负人的推开摩西说，‘谁立你做我们的首领和审判官？

csbs.text: “但那欺负同伴的人把摩西推开，说： ‘谁委任你做我们的首领和审判官呢？
